snippet.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don’t (2025) Official Trailer
snippet.description:
NOW YOU SEE ME: NOW YOU DON’T – in theaters November 14, 2025. Starring Jesse Eisenberg, Woody Harrelson, Dave Franco, Isla Fisher, Justice Smith, Dominic Sessa, Ariana Greenblatt, with Rosamund Pike, and Morgan Freeman.

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym
 
https://www.instagram.com/nysmmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/NowYouSeeMeMovie
https://x.com/nysmmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@nysmmovie

#NowYouSeeMe

The Four Horsemen return along with a new generation of illusionists performing mind-melding twists, turns, surprises, and magic unlike anything ever captured on film.

Directed by Ruben Fleischer (Venom, Uncharted, Zombieland), NOW YOU SEE ME: NOW YOU DON’T stars Jesse Eisenberg, Woody Harrelson, Dave Franco, Isla Fisher, Justice Smith, Dominic Sessa, Ariana Greenblatt, with Rosamund Pike, and Morgan Freeman.
